zitadel.feature.v2beta.FeatureFlag.title: FeatureFlag
zitadel.feature.v2beta.FeatureFlag.description: FeatureFlag is a simple boolean Feature setting, without further payload.

oidcTokenExchange.title: oidc_token_exchange
oidcTokenExchange.description:
Deprecated: the flag has been removed and `urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange`
 grant type for the OIDC token endpoint is enabled by default.
 Token exchange can be used to request tokens with a lesser scope or impersonate other users.
 See the security policy to allow impersonation on an instance.
 This field is only kept for backward compatibility and will be removed in the next major version of Zitadel.

oidcTokenExchange.title: oidc_token_exchange
oidcTokenExchange.description:
Deprecated: the flag has been removed and `urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:token-exchange`
 grant type for the OIDC token endpoint is enabled by default.
 Token exchange can be used to request tokens with a lesser scope or impersonate other users.
 See the security policy to allow impersonation on an instance.
 This field is only kept for backward compatibility and will be removed in the next major version of Zitadel.
 Setting the field will have no effect.

sequence.title: sequence
sequence.description:
sequence represents the order of events. It's always counting

 on read: the sequence of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

changeDate.title: change_date
changeDate.description:
change_date is the timestamp when the object was changed

 on read: the timestamp of the last event reduced by the projection

 on manipulation: the timestamp of the event(s) added by the manipulation

resourceOwner.title: resource_owner
resourceOwner.description: resource_owner is the organization or instance_id an object belongs to

creationDate.title: creation_date
creationDate.description: creation_date is the timestamp where the first operation on the object was made
